# Personality Calculator

Personality Calculator provides free personality tests and calculators with instant, shareable results.

## Pages

- https://personalitycalculator.org/ - Directory of free personality tests and calculators.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/mbti-personality-test.html - Free MBTI-inspired 60-question personality test with type, variant, scores, strengths, growth tips, and career matches.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/tomodachi-life-personality-calculator.html - Tomodachi Life personality calculator with US and UK/EU naming, trait values, random generation, and downloadable result cards.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/which-infp-avatar-represents-you.html - Visual MBTI avatar card library with 32 generated avatar images for all 16 personality types.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/love-language-test.html - Find the ways you most naturally give and receive affection in close relationships. Answer 15 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/friendship-test.html - Understand how you show up for friends, keep bonds alive, and build trust. Answer 15 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/introvert-vs-extrovert-test.html - Map where your social energy naturally sits, from reflective introversion to expressive extraversion. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/anime-personality-match.html - Match your story energy to a familiar anime-style archetype. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/dark-triad-test.html - A non-clinical reflection on narcissism, Machiavellianism, and psychopathy-related tendencies. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/career-personality-test.html - Discover the work environments and career themes that fit your motivations. Answer 18 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/social-skills-test.html - Evaluate the social strengths you use most often and the areas worth practicing. Answer 15 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/enneagram-test.html - Explore the core motivations behind nine common Enneagram patterns. Answer 18 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/big-5-personality-test.html - Measure the OCEAN traits: Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism. Answer 15 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/would-you-rather-personality-test.html - Fast tradeoffs that reveal your default personality mode. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/disc-personality-test.html - Identify your workplace behavior pattern across Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, and Conscientiousness. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/attachment-style-test.html - Reflect on how you seek closeness, safety, and independence in relationships. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/emotional-intelligence-test.html - See which parts of emotional intelligence are strongest for you. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/communication-style-test.html - Find your default communication style in everyday conversations and conflict. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/conflict-style-test.html - Discover how you tend to respond when needs, values, or priorities clash. Answer 10 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/learning-style-test.html - Find the learning conditions that help new information stick. Answer 8 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/leadership-style-test.html - Identify how you guide people, decisions, and momentum. Answer 10 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/values-test.html - Clarify the values that most often drive your choices. Answer 10 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/work-style-test.html - Learn the work conditions that help you do your best work. Answer 8 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/stress-response-test.html - See your most common response pattern when pressure rises. Answer 8 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/hexaco-personality-test.html - Measure six broad personality traits: Honesty-Humility, Emotionality, Extraversion, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, and Openness. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/four-temperaments-test.html - Find your classic temperament pattern across sanguine, choleric, melancholic, and phlegmatic styles. Answer 8 questions and get instant scored results.

- https://personalitycalculator.org/optimism-pessimism-test.html - Understand whether you naturally expect opportunity, risk, or a grounded mix of both. Answer 9 questions and get instant scored results.

- https://personalitycalculator.org/grit-test.html - Measure perseverance, long-term focus, and consistency through difficulty. Answer 9 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/self-esteem-test.html - Reflect on confidence, self-acceptance, and how you respond to mistakes. Answer 9 questions and get instant scored results.

- https://personalitycalculator.org/kolbe-conative-style-test.html - Discover how you instinctively take action: researching, organizing, experimenting, or building tangibly. Answer 8 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/working-genius-test.html - Identify which stages of work energize you most: wondering, inventing, discerning, galvanizing, enabling, or tenacity. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.

- https://personalitycalculator.org/thomas-kilmann-style-test.html - Explore your conflict mode across competing, collaborating, compromising, avoiding, and accommodating. Answer 10 questions and get instant scored results.

- https://personalitycalculator.org/dark-tetrad-test.html - Reflect on non-clinical dark trait signals across narcissism, Machiavellianism, psychopathy, and everyday sadism. Answer 8 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/perma-wellbeing-profile-test.html - Discover which PERMA wellbeing pillars are strongest for you: positive emotion, engagement, relationships, meaning, and accomplishment. Answer 10 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/self-determination-motivation-test.html - Map your motivation across autonomy, competence, relatedness, intrinsic interest, and external pressure. Answer 10 questions and get instant scored results.

Answer 20 questions and get instant scored results.

- https://personalitycalculator.org/comrey-personality-scales-style-test.html - Reflect on broad personality factors such as trust, orderliness, conformity, activity, emotional stability, extraversion, masculinity-femininity style, and empathy. Answer 16 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/six-factor-personality-questionnaire-style-test.html - Explore six broad personality factors across industriousness, independence, methodicalness, enthusiasm, assertiveness, and sensitivity. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/career-adaptability-test.html - Assess career adaptability through concern, control, curiosity, confidence, support, and experimentation. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/career-beliefs-inventory-style-test.html - Identify career beliefs around perfection, certainty, external approval, opportunity, persistence, and self-direction. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/social-desirability-style-test.html - Reflect on impression management, approval seeking, virtue signaling, conflict avoidance, honest self-reporting, and self-deception risk. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/ucla-loneliness-style-test.html - Reflect on loneliness patterns across isolation, belonging, perceived support, intimacy, social confidence, and reconnection habits. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/affective-neuroscience-personality-style-test.html - Explore ANPS-style emotional systems across seeking, care, play, fear, anger, sadness, and regulation. Answer 14 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/five-facet-mindfulness-style-test.html - Reflect on mindfulness through observing, describing, acting with awareness, nonjudging, and nonreactivity. Answer 10 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/oad-style-work-personality-test.html - Reflect on workplace behavioral tendencies across assertiveness, patience, detail orientation, sociability, structure, and drive. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/wonderlic-style-work-traits-test.html - Explore work traits often used in hiring conversations: learning speed, dependability, motivation, teamwork, adaptability, and judgment. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/berke-style-assessment-test.html - Map work fit through motivations, problem solving, communication, pace, structure, and collaboration preferences. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/winslow-personality-profile-style-test.html - Reflect on workplace traits across ambition, sociability, recognition, organization, self-control, and leadership confidence. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/keirsey-temperament-sorter-style-test.html - Explore Keirsey-style temperament themes across Artisan, Guardian, Idealist, and Rational patterns. Answer 16 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/self-directed-search-style-test.html - Explore Self-Directed-Search-style career themes across realistic, investigative, artistic, social, enterprising, and conventional interests. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/onet-interest-profiler-style-test.html - Map work activity preferences using RIASEC-style interest areas commonly used in career exploration. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/kuder-career-interest-style-test.html - Explore broad career interest signals across outdoor, mechanical, computational, scientific, persuasive, artistic, literary, social service, and clerical themes. Answer 18 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/campbell-interest-and-skill-survey-style-test.html - Compare interest and confidence signals across influencing, organizing, helping, creating, analyzing, and producing work. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/jackson-vocational-interest-survey-style-test.html - Explore vocational interest patterns across expressive, logical, investigative, practical, social, and business-oriented themes. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.
- https://personalitycalculator.org/career-assessment-inventory-style-test.html - Identify career interest patterns through practical, technical, creative, helping, persuading, and organizing work preferences. Answer 12 questions and get instant scored results.

## Notes

- Tests are free to use.
- User answers stay in the browser unless the user chooses to share a result link or card.
